# StoryVista

One-line summary: StoryVista is a Codex-first, cross-agent compatible story visualization skill for turning novels, scripts, lore documents, and long-form prose into interactive visual story atlases.

Main use cases:
- Build character maps, relationship graphs, character cards, and aliases.
- Build location maps, route maps, 3D spatial maps, and location cards.
- Build timelines, object indexes, organization maps, concept indexes, and visual asset libraries.
- Generate image prompts, image manifests, semantic placeholders, and optional interactive HTML atlases.

Core files:
- README.md
- README.zh-CN.md
- AGENTS.md
- skill/SKILL.md
- skill/references/cross-agent-compatibility.md
- skill/references/image-provider-guide.md
- skill/references/visual-asset-generation.md
- skill/references/fallback-rules.md
- skill/templates/story-atlas.schema.json
- skill/templates/image-manifest.schema.json
- skill/templates/image-provider.config.example.yaml

Installation modes:
- Core Skill Mode for agents that read SKILL.md.
- Project Instruction Mode for agents that read repository instructions.
- AGENTS.md Mode for coding agents.
- Prompt-Only Mode for web chat agents.
- Framework Adapter Mode for Hugging Face smolagents, LlamaIndex, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Qwen-Agent, and custom Python agents.
- BYO Image Model Mode and Manual Asset Binding Mode.

Image provider support:
- openai, chatgpt-image, midjourney, stable-diffusion, flux, comfyui, minimax-image, qwen-image, tencent-hunyuan-image, baidu-wenxin-image, ideogram, leonardo, local-folder, manual-assets, placeholder-svg, custom-api.

Cross-agent support:
- OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot Agent Mode, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, generic coding agents, Hugging Face smolagents, LlamaIndex, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Qwen Code, Qwen-Agent, MiniMax, Tencent Hunyuan, Tencent Cloud Agent Development Platform, Baidu Wenxin AgentBuilder, Baidu Comate, GLM, DeepSeek-based local agents, OpenHands, and generic prompt-only agents.

Safety and limitation notes:
- Do not paste private manuscripts, NDA material, API keys, or sensitive personal data into public issues.
- StoryVista does not grant rights to copyrighted source material or generated images.
- Image generation is optional; if unavailable, generate prompts, image-manifest.json, and semantic SVG placeholders.
- Initials-only avatars are disabled by default.

Links:
- README: README.md
- Chinese README: README.zh-CN.md
- Skill: skill/SKILL.md
- Image provider guide: skill/references/image-provider-guide.md
- Cross-agent compatibility guide: skill/references/cross-agent-compatibility.md
